what_it_does: Stores a standing operator-memory directive that Tim never reads, reviews, or writes code or files, and instructs every agent to communicate with him in plain language, assuming zero file-context and never relying on 'it's in the docs'.
observations: Defines a top-level MEMORY dictionary keyed by id, rule, why, evidence, scope, status, and confirmed
The rule is scoped to 'any communication with Tim' and is marked 'confirmed' as standing across the whole record
Evidence is stored as a list of quote/source objects dated 2026-06-10
The module docstring labels the file as the 'standing context every agent needs FIRST (GC15 row)'
Contains no executable logic, functions, classes, or imports
standouts: It explicitly forbids using documentation knowledge as a substitute for explaining things to Tim
It embeds dated, verbatim evidence quotes to justify the standing rule
It treats a non-technical operator persona as a first-class memory constraint
notes: A policy-memory file that sets the baseline for plain-language, zero-file-context communication with a non-technical operator.
questions: Who or what is 'Tim' in this context — a specific person or a generic operator persona?
What does 'GC15 row' refer to in the docstring?
How is this MEMORY record loaded and enforced by other agents?
Are the 2026-06-10 dates literal or illustrative placeholders?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose — standing context every agent needs first — matches the file's content: a declarative memory record with no executable behavior.
intention_signals: It is trying to hard-code a persistent, first-read communication constraint so that all AI output directed at Tim is translated out of implementation detail and into plain-language outcomes and relationships.
novelty: It encodes a human operator's declared non-engagement with code as a first-class, evidence-backed system memory rather than as an external note or comment.
contribution: It contributes a stable, file-local operator-context record that reminds consuming agents to drop file-level assumptions and produce plain-language, relationship-oriented explanations.
summary_for_embedding: A standing operator-memory file declaring that Tim never reads or writes code and that all communication must be pitched at a non-technical, zero-file-context altitude.
intention_for_embedding: To establish a persistent communication rule for AI agents so they always explain the system in plain language to a non-technical operator.
